templateInstructions:
[auto_div_total_scope] Edit only these text nodes and inline styles:
      .scope-big text   → TOTAL_HOURS from Reference Sheet (label 'Total Hours 2026', value 246041) → '246k'
      .scope-label      → always 'Total hours in 2026'
      .scope-sub        → PLANNED_HOURS + ' Initiative Backlog + ' + SPENT_HOURS + ' Spent'
                          PLANNED_HOURS: Reference Sheet label 'Planned Hours 2026' = 160808 → '160.8k'
                          SPENT_HOURS:   Reference Sheet label 'Spent Hours 2026'   = 85233  → '85.2k'
                          Result: '160.8k Initiative Backlog + 85.2k Spent'
      Do NOT change CSS, class names, or element structure.

[auto_div_requester_distribution] Edit only these text nodes and inline styles:
      .req-title               → 'Feature Backlog by Requester (' + PLANNED_HOURS + ')'
                                  e.g. 'Feature Backlog by Requester (160.8k)'
      .req-seg.grc style.width → GRC_PCT + '%'  and inner text → GRC_PCT + '%'
      .req-seg.gtm style.width → GTM_PCT + '%'  and inner text → GTM_PCT + '%'
      .req-seg.oth style.width → OTHER_PCT + '%' and inner text → OTHER_PCT + '%'
      Legend (.req-leg-pct):
        1st (GRC)   → GRC_TOTAL hours in k notation, e.g. '58.3k'
        2nd (GTM)   → GTM_TOTAL hours in k notation, e.g. '4.4k'
        3rd (Other) → OTHER_TOTAL hours in k notation, e.g. '101.3k'
      Source: Requester Stats sheet — sum Estimate by Requester across all PIs.
      Percentages: round( requester_total / sum_all_requesters × 100 ) to nearest integer.
      Do NOT change CSS, class names, legend labels, or element structure.

[auto_div_pi28_card] This card represents PI 28. Edit only text nodes and inline style widths.

      Card header:
        .pi-name   → 'PI 28'
        .pi-hours  → PI28_TOTAL: read from Reference Sheet, label 'PI 28 Total Hours' → 56218 → '56.2k'

      Mini requester bar (.pi-req-bar):
        Per-requester hours: read from Requester Stats where PI='PI28' (direct cell reads, no summing)
        Percentages = round( requester_estimate / PI28_TOTAL × 100 ):
        .pi-req-bar-seg.grc style.width → round(24084/56218×100) = 43%
        .pi-req-bar-seg.gtm style.width → round(3907/56218×100)  = 7%
        .pi-req-bar-seg.oth style.width → round(29942/56218×100) = 53%

      Mini legend (.pi-req-mini-val):
        1st (GRC)   → '24.1k'
        2nd (GTM)   → '3.9k'
        3rd (Other) → '29.9k'

      Initiative rows (.pi-init-row): one row per initiative group from Initiative Group Stats where PI='PI28'.
        .pi-init-name  → Roadmap Initiative Group name
        .pi-init-bar-fill style.width → BAR PERCENTAGE RULE: max group = 100%, others proportional
        .pi-init-val   → Estimate in k notation
      Sort rows by Estimate descending. Add or remove .pi-init-row elements to match actual group count.
      Do NOT change CSS, class names, card classes (pi28), or structural elements.

[auto_div_pi29_card] This card represents PI 29. Edit only text nodes and inline style widths.

      Card header:
        .pi-name   → 'PI 29'
        .pi-hours  → PI29_TOTAL: read from Reference Sheet, label 'PI 29 Total Hours' → 66240 → '66.2k'

      Mini requester bar (.pi-req-bar):
        Per-requester hours: read from Requester Stats where PI='PI29' (direct cell reads, no summing)
        Percentages = round( requester_estimate / PI29_TOTAL × 100 ):
        .pi-req-bar-seg.grc style.width → round(25745/66240×100) = 39%
        .pi-req-bar-seg.gtm style.width → round(508/66240×100)   = 1%
        .pi-req-bar-seg.oth style.width → round(40423/66240×100) = 61%

      Mini legend (.pi-req-mini-val):
        1st (GRC)   → '25.7k'
        2nd (GTM)   → '0.5k'
        3rd (Other) → '40.4k'

      Initiative rows (.pi-init-row): one row per initiative group from Initiative Group Stats where PI='PI29'.
        .pi-init-name  → Roadmap Initiative Group name
        .pi-init-bar-fill style.width → BAR PERCENTAGE RULE: max group = 100%, others proportional
        .pi-init-val   → Estimate in k notation
      Sort rows by Estimate descending. Add or remove .pi-init-row elements to match actual group count.
      Do NOT change CSS, class names, card classes (pi29), or structural elements.

[auto_div_pi30_card] This card represents PI 30. Edit only text nodes and inline style widths.
      Note: PI30 has no GTM row in Requester Stats.

      Card header:
        .pi-name   → 'PI 30'
        .pi-hours  → PI30_TOTAL: read from Reference Sheet, label 'PI 30 Total Hours' → 38373 → '38.4k'

      Mini requester bar (.pi-req-bar):
        Per-requester hours: read from Requester Stats where PI='PI30' (direct cell reads, no summing)
        Percentages = round( requester_estimate / PI30_TOTAL × 100 ):
        .pi-req-bar-seg.grc style.width → round(8493/38373×100)  = 22%
        .pi-req-bar-seg.gtm             → REMOVE this element entirely (no GTM for PI30)
        .pi-req-bar-seg.oth style.width → round(30932/38373×100) = 81%

      Mini legend (.pi-req-mini-val):
        1st (GRC)   → '8.5k'
        2nd (GTM)   → '-'
        3rd (Other) → '30.9k'

      Initiative rows (.pi-init-row): one row per initiative group from Initiative Group Stats where PI='PI30'.
        .pi-init-name  → Roadmap Initiative Group name
        .pi-init-bar-fill style.width → BAR PERCENTAGE RULE: max group = 100%, others proportional
        .pi-init-val   → Estimate in k notation
      Sort rows by Estimate descending. Add or remove .pi-init-row elements to match actual group count.
      Do NOT change CSS, class names, card classes (pi30), or structural elements.
